queries.text:
vw_active_super_emitters
| summarize arg_max(detection_timestamp, *) by event_id
| project detection_timestamp,facility_name, operator, emission_kg_per_hour

let vw_facility_emission_trends = () {
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | summarize
        detections_30d = countif(event_date >= ago(30d)),
        impact_30d = sumif(financial_impact_usd, event_date >= ago(30d)),
        detections_60d = countif(event_date >= ago(60d)),
        impact_60d = sumif(financial_impact_usd, event_date >= ago(60d)),
        detections_90d = countif(event_date >= ago(90d)),
        impact_90d = sumif(financial_impact_usd, event_date >= ago(90d)),
        max_risk_score=max(compliance_risk_score)
        by facility_key
    | join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility') on facility_key
    | extend 
        trend_30_to_60 = case(
            detections_30d > detections_60d - detections_30d, "INCREASING",
            detections_30d < detections_60d - detections_30d, "DECREASING",
            "STABLE"
        )
};
vw_facility_emission_trends

hourly_trends()
| where hour_bin >= ago(30d)
| project 
    Timestamp = hour_bin,
    ['Total Emissions (kg/hr)'] = total_emissions,
    ['Super-Emitters'] = super_emitters,
    ['Avg per Event'] = avg_emission_per_event
| render timechart 
    with (
        title="Emission Trends - Last 7 Days",
        xtitle="Time",
        ytitle="Emission Rate (kg/hr)",
        legend=visible
    )

// Widget 1: Active Super-Emitters
realtime_kpis
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(30d)
| summarize ActiveSuperEmitters = sum(super_emitter_count)
| project Value = ActiveSuperEmitters, Label = "Active Super-Emitters"

// Widget 2: Total Methane Loss
realtime_kpis
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(30d)
| summarize TotalMCF = round(sum(total_methane_loss_mcf), 1)
| project TotalMCF,Value = strcat(TotalMCF, " MCF"), Label = "Methane Loss (7d)"

// Widget 3: Financial Impact
realtime_kpis
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(30d)
| summarize TotalImpact = round(sum(total_financial_impact), 0)
| project Value = strcat("$", toint(TotalImpact)), Label = "Financial Impact (7d)"

// Widget 4: Critical Facilities
realtime_kpis
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(30d)
| summarize Critical = max(critical_facilities)
| project Value = Critical, Label = "Critical Risk Facilities"

external_table('gold_emission_events') 
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(30d)
| where facility_name == Facility
| summarize 
    emission_count = count(),
    total_emissions = sum(emission_kg_per_hour),
    max_risk = max(compliance_risk_score),
    total_impact = sum(financial_impact_usd)
    by facility_name, latitude, longitude
| extend 
    intensity = case(
        total_emissions > 10000, "EXTREME",
        total_emissions > 5000, "HIGH",
        total_emissions > 1000, "MEDIUM",
        "LOW"
    )
| project 
    Facility = facility_name,
    Latitude = latitude,
    Longitude = longitude,
    Emissions = total_emissions,
    Events = emission_count,
    Risk = max_risk,
    Impact = total_impact,
    Intensity = intensity

external_table('gold_emission_events')
|where emission_severity in (['Emission Severity'])
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(50d)
| project 
    ['Detection Time'] = format_datetime(detection_timestamp, 'HH:mm:ss'),
    Facility = facility_name,
    ['Emission Rate'] = strcat(round(emission_kg_per_hour, 0), " kg/hr"),
    Severity = emission_severity,
    ['Impact'] = strcat("$", round(financial_impact_usd, 0)),
    ['Risk'] = compliance_risk_score,
    Status = case(
        work_order_generated != "", "✓ Work Order Created",
        compliance_risk_score >= 7, "⚠ Action Required",
        "🔍 Under Review"
    )
| order by ['Detection Time'] desc
| take 10

facility_metrics
|where facility_name in (['Facility'])
| where detection_count > 0
| extend priority_score_100 = round(priority_score * 100.0 / 110, 0)
| top 10 by priority_score desc
| project 
    Facility = facility_name,
    ['Priority Score'] = priority_score,
    ['Priority Score (100)'] = priority_score_100,
    ['Detections'] = detection_count,
    ['Financial Impact'] = total_financial_impact
| render barchart 
    with (
        kind=unstacked,
        title="Top 10 High-Risk Facilities",
        xcolumn=Facility,
        ycolumns=['Priority Score']
    )

equipment_failures
| project 
    Category = strcat(equipment_type, " - ", manufacturer),
    failure_count = failure_count,
    total_impact = total_impact,
    impact =strcat(round(total_impact/1000, 0),"K"),
    Label = strcat(equipment_type, "\n", failure_count, " failures\n$", round(total_impact/1000, 0), "K")

external_table('gold_emission_events')
|where emission_severity in (['Emission Severity'])
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(50d)
| summarize 
    TotalDetections = count(),
    WorkOrdersGenerated = countif(work_order_generated != ""),
    SuperEmitters = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd)
    by Day = bin(detection_timestamp, 1d)
| extend 
    WorkOrderRate = round(100.0 * WorkOrdersGenerated / TotalDetections, 1),
    AvgImpactPerDay = round(TotalFinancialImpact / 1000, 0)
| project 
    Day,
    ['Total Detections'] = TotalDetections,
    ['Work Orders Generated'] = WorkOrdersGenerated,
    ['Super-Emitters'] = SuperEmitters,
    ['WO Generation Rate (%)'] = WorkOrderRate
| render timechart 
    with (
        title="Work Order Generation vs. Detections (30 Days)",
        xtitle="Date",
        ytitle="Count",
        legend=visible
    )

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| where work_order_generated != ""
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(30d)
| extend response_assumed_hours = case(
    compliance_risk_score >= 9, 4,          // CRITICAL: 4-hour SLA
    financial_impact_usd > 50000, 24,       // HIGH VALUE: 24-hour SLA
    compliance_risk_score >= 7, 24,         // HIGH RISK: 24-hour SLA
    48                                       // MEDIUM: 48-hour SLA
)
| summarize 
    AvgResponseHours = round(avg(response_assumed_hours), 1),
    TotalWorkOrders = count(),
    CriticalWorkOrders = countif(compliance_risk_score >= 9),
    HighWorkOrders = countif(compliance_risk_score >= 7 and compliance_risk_score < 9),
    MediumWorkOrders = countif(compliance_risk_score < 7)
| extend 
    // Main value to display
    DisplayValue = strcat(AvgResponseHours, " hrs"),
    // Subtitle with context
    Subtitle = strcat(
        TotalWorkOrders, " WOs: ",
        CriticalWorkOrders, " Critical, ",
        HighWorkOrders, " High, ",
        MediumWorkOrders, " Medium"
    ),    
    // Status indicator
    Status = case(
        AvgResponseHours > 24, "⚠️ Above Target",
        AvgResponseHours > 12, "✓ Within Target",
        "✓ Excellent"
    ),    
    // Color code for dashboard formatting
    ColorCode = case(
        AvgResponseHours > 24, "RED",
        AvgResponseHours > 12, "YELLOW",
        "GREEN"
    )
| project 
    AvgResponseHours,
    Value = DisplayValue,
    Label = "Avg Response Time (7d)",
    Subtitle,
    Status,
    ColorCode

equipment_failures
| summarize 
    critical_count = countif(criticality == "CRITICAL"),
    total_failures = sum(failure_count),
    total_impact = sum(total_impact)
| project 
    critical_count,
    Value = critical_count,
    Label = "Critical Equipment Failures",
    Subtitle = strcat(
        total_failures, " failures, $",
        round(total_impact/1000, 0), "K impact"
    )

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_equipment')  on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(100d)
| where equipment_key != -1  // Exclude unmatched equipment
| summarize 
    TotalMethaneLossMCF = sum(total_methane_loss_mcf),
    EventCount = count(),
    AvgEmissionRate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
    MaxRiskScore = max(compliance_risk_score)
    by 
        EquipmentType = equipment_type,
        Facility =facility_name,
        Manufacturer = manufacturer
| extend 
    AvgLossPerEvent = round(TotalMethaneLossMCF / EventCount, 2),
    ImpactCategory = case(
        TotalMethaneLossMCF > 5000, " Critical Impact",
        TotalMethaneLossMCF > 2000, " High Impact",
        TotalMethaneLossMCF > 500, " Medium Impact",
        " Low Impact"
    ),
    // Create hierarchical label for treemap
    Label = strcat(
        EquipmentType, "\n",
        Manufacturer, "\n",
        Facility, "\n",
        round(TotalMethaneLossMCF, 0), " MCF"
    )
| project 
    Manufacturer,
    //Facility,
    ['Total Methane Loss (MCF)'] = round(TotalMethaneLossMCF, 2),
   //['Event Count'] = EventCount,
    ['Avg Loss per Event'] = AvgLossPerEvent,
    ['Financial Impact ($)'] = round(TotalFinancialImpact, 0)
    //['Impact Category'] = ImpactCategory
    //Label
| order by ['Total Methane Loss (MCF)'] desc

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(60d)
| extend 
    ResponseTimeHours = case(
        work_order_generated != "", 
            case(
                compliance_risk_score >= 9, 4,    // CRITICAL: 4-hour SLA
                compliance_risk_score >= 7, 24,   // HIGH: 24-hour SLA
                financial_impact_usd > 50000, 24, // HIGH VALUE: 24-hour SLA
                48                                 // MEDIUM: 48-hour SLA
            ),
        999  // No work order generated yet
    )
|extend
    ResponsePerformance = case(
        work_order_generated == "", "⏳ Pending",
        ResponseTimeHours <= 4, "🟢 Excellent (≤4hr)",
        ResponseTimeHours <= 24, "🟡 Good (≤24hr)",
        "🟠 Needs Improvement (>24hr)"
    )
| summarize 
    TotalEvents = count(),
    AvgResponseTime = round(avg(ResponseTimeHours), 1),
    ExcellentResponses = countif(ResponseTimeHours <= 4),
    GoodResponses = countif(ResponseTimeHours > 4 and ResponseTimeHours <= 24),
    SlowResponses = countif(ResponseTimeHours > 24 and ResponseTimeHours < 999),
    PendingResponses = countif(ResponseTimeHours == 999),
    // Break down by severity
    SuperEmitters = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
    HighEmitters = countif(emission_severity == "HIGH"),
    MediumEmitters = countif(emission_severity == "MEDIUM")
    by Facility = facility_name, Severity = emission_severity
| extend 
    ResponseRate = round(100.0 * (ExcellentResponses + GoodResponses) / TotalEvents, 1),
    AvgResponseDisplay = case(
        AvgResponseTime >= 999, "No WO",
        strcat(AvgResponseTime, " hrs")
    )
|extend
    Grade = case(
        ResponseRate >= 90, "A",
        ResponseRate >= 75, "B",
        ResponseRate >= 60, "C",
        "D"
    )
| project 
    Facility,
    Severity,
    ['Total Events'] = TotalEvents,
    ['Avg Response Time'] = AvgResponseDisplay,
    ['Response Rate (%)'] = ResponseRate,
    [' Pending'] = PendingResponses,
    Grade
| order by Severity desc, ['Response Rate (%)']  asc

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(90d)
| summarize 
    TotalDetections = count(),
    TotalMethaneLoss = sum(total_methane_loss_mcf),
    AvgEmissionRate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
    SuperEmitterCount = countif(emission_severity == "SUPER_EMITTER"),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
    MaxRiskScore = max(compliance_risk_score)
    by 
        Facility = facility_name,
        FacilityAge = facility_age_years,
        ProductionTier = production_tier,
        DailyOilBBL = daily_oil_bbl,
        DailyGasMCF = daily_gas_mcf
| extend 
    // Calculate detection rate per year of age
    DetectionsPerAgeYear = round(1.0 * TotalDetections / FacilityAge, 2),
    // Calculate impact per production unit
    ImpactPerBBL = round(TotalFinancialImpact / DailyOilBBL, 2),
    // Age category
    AgeCategory = case(
        FacilityAge >= 20, "🔴 Mature (20+ yrs)",
        FacilityAge >= 10, "🟠 Established (10-19 yrs)",
        FacilityAge >= 5, "🟡 Mid-Life (5-9 yrs)",
        "🟢 New (<5 yrs)"
    ),
    // Risk profile
    RiskProfile = case(
        SuperEmitterCount > 0 and FacilityAge >= 15, "High Risk - Aging Asset",
        SuperEmitterCount > 0, "High Risk - Active Emitter",
        TotalDetections >= 5, "Medium Risk - Frequent Events",
        "Low Risk"
    )
| project 
    Facility,
    ['Age (years)'] = FacilityAge,
    ['Age Category'] = AgeCategory,
    ['Production Tier'] = ProductionTier,
    ['Total Detections'] = TotalDetections,
    ['Detections/Year'] = DetectionsPerAgeYear,
    ['Methane Loss (MCF)'] = round(TotalMethaneLoss, 0),
    ['Super-Emitters'] = SuperEmitterCount,
    ['Financial Impact ($)'] = round(TotalFinancialImpact, 0),
    ['Risk Profile'] = RiskProfile
| order by ['Age (years)'] desc

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_equipment')  on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(90d)
| where equipment_key != -1
| summarize 
    TotalFailures = count(),
    EquipmentCount = dcount(equipment_id),
    AvgEmissionRate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
    TotalMethaneLoss = sum(total_methane_loss_mcf),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
    AvgEquipmentAge = avg(equipment_age_years),
    CriticalEquipment = dcountif(equipment_id, criticality == "CRITICAL")
    by Manufacturer = manufacturer
| extend 
    FailureRate = round(100.0 * TotalFailures / EquipmentCount, 1),
    AvgImpactPerFailure = round(TotalFinancialImpact / TotalFailures, 0)
|extend 
    PerformanceScore = round(
        (FailureRate * 0.4) +                        // 40% weight on failure rate
        (AvgEmissionRate / 100 * 0.3) +              // 30% weight on emission severity
        (AvgImpactPerFailure / 1000 * 0.3),          // 30% weight on financial impact
    1)
|extend 
    Ranking = case(
        PerformanceScore < 50, " Top Tier",
        PerformanceScore < 100, " Above Average",
        PerformanceScore < 150, " Average",
        "⚠️ Below Average"
    )
| project 
    Manufacturer,
    ['Equipment Count'] = EquipmentCount,
    ['Total Failures'] = TotalFailures,
    ['Methane Loss (MCF)'] = round(TotalMethaneLoss, 0),
    ['Avg Emission Rate'] = round(AvgEmissionRate, 0),
    ['Avg Impact/Failure'] = AvgImpactPerFailure,
    Ranking,
    ['Avg Equipment Age'] = round(AvgEquipmentAge, 1)
| order by ['Total Failures'] desc

let FailureEvents = 
    external_table('gold_emission_events') 
    | join kind=inner external_table('dim_equipment')  on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
    | where detection_timestamp >= ago(180d)
    | where equipment_key != -1
    | project 
        equipment_tag = equipment_tag, 
        facility_id = facility_id,
        detection_timestamp
    | order by equipment_tag asc, detection_timestamp asc
    | serialize;
// Step 2: Calculate time between failures using serialization
let FailureIntervals = 
    FailureEvents
    | extend 
        PrevFailureTime = prev(detection_timestamp, 1),
        PrevEquipmentTag = prev(equipment_tag, 1)
    | where equipment_tag == PrevEquipmentTag  // Only calculate within same equipment
    | extend DaysBetweenFailures = datetime_diff('day', detection_timestamp, PrevFailureTime)
    | summarize AvgDaysBetween = avg(DaysBetweenFailures) 
        by equipment_tag, facility_id;
// Step 3: Get last failure date and count
let FailureSummary = 
    external_table('gold_emission_events') 
    | join kind=inner external_table('dim_equipment')  on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
    | where detection_timestamp >= ago(180d)
    | where equipment_key != -1
    | summarize 
        FailureCount = count(),
        LastFailure = max(detection_timestamp)
        by equipment_tag = equipment_tag, facility_id = facility_id;
// Step 4: Combine and calculate predictions
FailureSummary
| join kind=leftouter FailureIntervals on equipment_tag, facility_id
| extend 
    DaysSinceLastFailure = datetime_diff('day', now(), LastFailure),
    PredictedNextFailure = case(
        isnan(AvgDaysBetween) or isnull(AvgDaysBetween) or AvgDaysBetween <= 0, datetime(null),
        LastFailure + totimespan(AvgDaysBetween * 1d)
    ),
    DaysUntilPredicted = case(
        isnan(AvgDaysBetween) or isnull(AvgDaysBetween) or AvgDaysBetween <= 0, 999,
        datetime_diff('day', now(), LastFailure + totimespan(AvgDaysBetween * 1d))
    )
| extend 
    Status = case(
        DaysUntilPredicted <= 0, "🔴 OVERDUE",
        DaysUntilPredicted <= 7, "🟠 CRITICAL (7 days)",
        DaysUntilPredicted <= 30, "🟡 UPCOMING (30 days)",
        DaysUntilPredicted >= 999, "⚪ Insufficient Data",
        "🟢 NORMAL"
    )
| where DaysUntilPredicted <= 60 or DaysUntilPredicted >= 999  // Show next 60 days + unknowns
| project 
    ['Equipment'] = equipment_tag,
    Facility = facility_id,
    ['Last Failure'] = format_datetime(LastFailure, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    ['Predicted Next'] = case(
        isnull(PredictedNextFailure), "Unknown",
        format_datetime(PredictedNextFailure, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
    ),
    ['Days Until'] = case(
        DaysUntilPredicted >= 999, -1,
        DaysUntilPredicted
    ),
    ['Past Failures'] = FailureCount,
    ['Avg Days Between'] = case(
        isnull(AvgDaysBetween), 0.0,
        round(AvgDaysBetween, 1)
    ),
    Status
| order by ['Days Until'] asc

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_equipment')  on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(90d)
| where equipment_key != -1
| summarize 
    TotalFailures = count(),
    EquipmentCount = dcount(equipment_id),
    AvgEmissionRate = avg(emission_kg_per_hour),
    TotalMethaneLoss = sum(total_methane_loss_mcf),
    TotalFinancialImpact = sum(financial_impact_usd),
    AvgEquipmentAge = avg(equipment_age_years),
    CriticalEquipment = dcountif(equipment_id, criticality == "CRITICAL")
    by Manufacturer = manufacturer
| extend 
    FailureRate = round(100.0 * TotalFailures / EquipmentCount, 1),
    AvgImpactPerFailure = round(TotalFinancialImpact / TotalFailures, 0)
|extend 
    PerformanceScore = round(
        (FailureRate * 0.4) +                        // 40% weight on failure rate
        (AvgEmissionRate / 100 * 0.3) +              // 30% weight on emission severity
        (AvgImpactPerFailure / 1000 * 0.3),          // 30% weight on financial impact
    1)
|extend 
    Ranking = case(
        PerformanceScore < 50, " Top Tier",
        PerformanceScore < 100, " Above Average",
        PerformanceScore < 150, " Average",
        "⚠️ Below Average"
    )
| project 
    Manufacturer,
    ['Equipment Count'] = EquipmentCount,
    ['Total Failures'] = TotalFailures,
    ['Methane Loss (MCF)'] = round(TotalMethaneLoss, 0),
    ['Avg Emission Rate'] = round(AvgEmissionRate, 0),
    ['Avg Impact/Failure'] = AvgImpactPerFailure,
    Ranking,
    ['Avg Equipment Age'] = round(AvgEquipmentAge, 1)
| order by ['Total Failures'] desc

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where facility_name == (Facility)
| summarize TotalRate = sum(emission_kg_per_hour)
| extend DisplayValue = strcat(round(TotalRate, 0), " kg/hr")
| project DisplayValue

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where facility_name == (Facility)
| summarize DailyLoss = sum(financial_impact_usd)
| extend DisplayValue = strcat("$", round(DailyLoss, 2))
| project DisplayValue

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name == Facility
| project 
        operator

external_table('dim_facility')
| where facility_name == Facility
| project facility_name

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| join kind=inner external_table('dim_facility')  on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
| where facility_name == (Facility)
| where detection_timestamp >= ago(180d)
| summarize EmissionRate = max(emission_kg_per_hour) 
  by bin(detection_timestamp, 1d)

external_table('dim_equipment') 
| join kind=inner (
    external_table('gold_emission_events')
    | join kind=inner (
        external_table('dim_facility')
        | where facility_name == Facility
    ) on $left.facility_key == $right.facility_key
) on $left.equipment_key == $right.equipment_key
| distinct 
    equipment_id,
    equipment_type,
    manufacturer,
    model,
    install_date,
    last_maintenance_date,
    equipment_age_years,
    facility_name
| project 
    Equipment = equipment_id,
    Type = equipment_type,
    Manufacturer = manufacturer,
    Model = model,
    //Severity = emiss,
    ["Install Date"] = format_datetime(install_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    ["Last Maintenance"] = format_datetime(last_maintenance_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
    ["Equipment Age (yrs)"] = equipment_age_years  
| order by Type asc, Facility asc

external_table('gold_emission_events')
| distinct emission_severity
| order by emission_severity desc

external_table('dim_facility')
| project facility_id, facility_name
| order by facility_name asc
| project DisplayValue = facility_name, Value = facility_id

external_table('dim_equipment')
|distinct equipment_type
| order by equipment_type desc
